response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, reported strong financial performance in the past year, with total revenue reaching **$54.4 million**—an impressive **18% year-over-year growth**. The company, which employs **342 people**, saw quarterly revenue fluctuate, peaking at **$16.2 million in Q4** after dipping to **$11.8 million in Q3**, while Q1 and Q2 brought in **$12.3 million and $14.1 million**, respectively. This consistent growth highlights Acme Corp’s expanding market presence.
